calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary by Petitioner Rhea Genther.

Dept. 204; Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Bailiff: Deputy Musto; Not reported

Case called at 10:44 a.m.
There being no appearances or objections, the will dated Aug-9-2023 is admitted to probate. Ria Genther is appointed executor with full authority.

COURT READS WILL IN OPEN COURT

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Continued To Dec-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
